form.title: Cars List Style 1 - Featured Cars Grid
form.sampledata: {":type":"ja_ngr:carslist","carslist":{"jatools-layout-carslist":"style-1","carslist[limit]":["9"],"carslist[view-all-url]":["/cars"],"carslist[view-all-label]":["Vezi toate mașinile"],"carslist[section-title]":["Flota Noastră"],"carslist[section-subtitle]":["Descoperă întreaga noastră colecție de automobile premium"]}}

fieldset.name: Basic Settings
fieldset.description: Basic settings for the cars list component

field.name: section-title
field.label: Section Title
field.description: Title displayed above the cars grid

field.name: section-subtitle
field.label: Section Subtitle
field.description: Subtitle displayed below the section title

field.name: view-all-url
field.label: View All URL
field.description: URL for the 'View All Cars' button. Leave empty to hide the button.

field.name: view-all-label
field.label: View All Button Label
field.description: Label for the view all button
